span.p:
Does a warm personal relationship
exist with a board member or staff?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does documented mission alignment exist?
(prior giving, public statements, known interests)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RESEARCH FIRST
build the donor profile before any outreach

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SEEK INTRODUCTION
identify the connector in your network

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Has capacity research been done?
(public records, wealth screening)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
QUALIFY FIRST
run capacity research before cultivation begins

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ROUTE TO ANNUAL FUND or MID-LEVEL
capacity does not support major-gift investment

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ENTER CULTIVATION CYCLE
assign stage, set next move, log in CRM
